title: Block 3 review: everything together
description: Multi-paragraph mixed content — symbols, code, prose, capitals

tips.text: 200 characters of the real thing - email, code, prose, a link, all in one breath. This is Block 3 entire.
Carry it at 32 WPM and Block 4 opens. No shortcuts to it; just the clean run.
When you meet a newline, press Enter. A break in the text is still part of the text.

tips.target: (240/300) loved the update! "Amazing," said Sam. Visit https://app.io for details.

character_tips.anna: Block 3 in a single paragraph - every skill you've built, asked for at once.
character_tips.maxim: Mixed content like this is what real digital writing actually looks like. No cleaner test.
character_tips.knopych: A taste of the final run. Everything you've learned, together on one line.
character_tips.klavochka: All of it at once now - and it holds. Look at that.
